arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Brentford LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups ahead of Emirates clash
arts.sum: The Gunners believe they still have a chance of winning the title despite trailing Liverpool by 11 points

arts.ttl: Arsenal learn Real Madrid Martin Zubimendi transfer truth ahead of summer window
arts.sum: "In recent weeks, Real Madrid have been increasingly linked with Zubimendi, 26, who Gunners boss Mikel Arteta greatly admires," Chief football writer, John Cross explains. Arsenal's hierarchy could land another important victory over Real Madrid this summer as they move forward with plans to bring Martin Zubimendi to the Emirates .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed fresh Champions League setback as Arsenal 'learn' latest blow
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Ferland Mendy will miss their second leg against Arsenal as Carlo Ancelotti's side look to do the unthinkable and turn around a three-goal deficit in the Champions League quarter-finals. "The plan has shifted from trying to have him ready for the Emirates to now aiming to have him fit for the Copa del Rey final in La Cartuja on April 26," he said.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues new Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice Arsenal injury update amid Real Madrid wait
arts.sum: Rice led the Gunners to a 3-0 win over Los Blancos at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night, scoring two brilliant free-kicks . Mikel Arteta has provided an injury update on Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka ahead of Arsenal's next clash against Brentford.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres' future 'confirmed' as Arsenal warned of new transfer bid
arts.sum: Sensationally, the Gunners have managed to position themselves in a strong position in their Champions League quarter-final against the reigning holders thanks to a 3-0 win at the Emirates Stadium. However, the Gunners are thought to be ready for another Kiwior approach at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed fresh Alexander Isak transfer lifeline after Newcastle United update - Will Jenkins
arts.sum: Newcastle United's revived interest in Dominic Calvert-Lewin could be the first sign that Eddie Howe's club is preparing for a future without Alexander Isak. However, the Magpies' interest in Calvert-Lewin has resurfaced as clubs prepare for the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea discover Victor Osimhen transfer timeline as fresh hope given
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen has revealed no decision will be made on his future until the end of this season - amid ongoing links with Arsenal and Chelsea among other Premier League sides. "There are always rumours about me, of course, but I prefer to live in the moment," he told local reporters after scoring his 29th goal of the season in a 2-0 win over Samsunspor for Galatasaray on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Brentford predicted to see if the Gunners close gap
arts.sum: Arsenal can put the pressure on Liverpool and close the gap once again when they take on Brentford in the Premier League later today. But for now, the Gunners need to be fully focused on the clash against Brentford later today, with the Bees having won five of their last six away games.

arts.ttl: Arsenal full squad revealed for Brentford as Mikel Arteta set for double boost
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to have Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice available for this weekend's Premier League clash against Brentford. However, Mikel Arteta has confirmed that the duo are both fit and available to start Saturday's Premier League clash against the Bees at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Brentford early team news hints after Declan Rice and Martin Odegaard double update
arts.sum: Arsenal have hinted that Declan Rice and Martin Odegaard will feature against Brentford despite the expectation of rotation before their Champions League quarter-final second leg versus Real Madrid . A photo of Rice knee sliding is the background of their next match graphic, with Odegaard the face of their matchday post.
